examples: She felt it would be utterly mortifying to be seen in such company as his by anyone.
It was a truly mortifying and disgusting experience.
Failure that is so mortifying and so devastating that it makes you try to become invisible.
This is an hilarious, heartfelt, mortifying, embarrassing speech, at least for the first hour or so.
And the headline robbery statistics themselves may not be quite so mortifying as they seem.
